description: RASCALS PREMIUM NAPPIES SIZE 5 (13-18KG) 64 PACK
long_description:
Rascals Premium Nappies are ultra-absorbent with up to 12 hours of leak protection and dermatologically tested gentle on skin.


Engineered with 6 Core Innovations for a high-performing nappy that's ready for every mess.


1. Unique Hydrolock Core
Our Hydrolock Core absorbs liquid with 4 layers of protection to help keep leaks contained.
2. Stretchy High-Back Waistband
The Rascals Stretchy High-Back Waistband is made with up to 12 pieces of elastic to hug around your baby's back comfortably.
3. AirSpun Softness
Using AirSpun Technology our nappy materials are hot-air bonded for a breathable, feather-soft feel that is gentle on skin.
4. Advanced Leak Protection
Our unique deep pocket and triple leak guards offer advanced protection from leaks and blowouts.
5. Fast-Dry Layer
Absorbs and traps liquid in seconds, to keep skin dry and help prevent rashes.
6. Zero Nasties [1]
Hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested, our nappy materials are gentle on delicate skin.


Don't just take our word for it, Rascals products are loved by millions of parents around the world with 210,000+ 5-Star Reviews Globally! [2]


Try Rascals Premium Nappies! Ready for every mess.
Available in sizes 0-7.

description: HUGGIES PURE & SENSITIVE NEWBORN NAPPIES SIZE 1: 86 PACK
long_description:
Experience gentle protection with every change with Huggies Pure and Sensitive premium nappies.

Our most gentle care, designed for sensitive skin. With simplified ingredients, consciously crafted with no lotions, no added fragrance, less additives and inks, and dermatologically tested.

Featuring Airsoft(R) Technology for ultimate softness and comfort for delicate skin and up to 12 hours protection for overnight leaks.

Plus, handy features for parents too - like a wetness indicator that changes colour when it's time for a change and our Size Up indicator to show when it's time to move up to the next size.

A soft hug, wrapped in modern Disney designs - Huggies Pure and Sensitive Nappies - it's like skincare for the other cheeks, baby.

* No added formaldehyde, elemental chlorine, natural rubber latex or other chemicals restricted by Kimberly-Clark
  • Huggies most gentle protection, designed for sensitive skin.

  • Simplified Ingredients with no lotions, no added fragrance, less additives, and less inks.

  • Dermatologically tested.

  • Airsoft(R) Technology for ultimate softness and comfort.

  • Up to 12 hours protection for overnight leaks.

  • Handy 'Wetness' and 'Size Up' indictors to help parents navigate change time..

  • Modern Disney Designs..

  • Available in unisex Nappies Sizes 1-3..

description: HUGGIES SKIN PROTECT NEWBORN NAPPIES SIZE 2:144 PACK
long_description:
Start your baby's journey with our most advanced skin protection - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Newborn Nappies.

With a clinically proven liner* enriched with Zinc Oxide (commonly found in nappy rash cream), to help protect against irritation, with visibly less redness on skin.

With our Drytouch(R) layer and wide pocket waistband to absorb and lock away runny poo, and Breathe Dry(R) technology that allows air to circulate around baby's skin.

Plus, handy features for parents too - like a wetness indicator that changes colour when it's time for a change and our Size Up indicator to show when it's time to move up to the next size.

Wrapped up in super cute Disney designs - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Newborn Nappies - it's like skincare for the other cheeks, baby.

* This claim is based of a clinical study conducted at an independent laboratory, using adult skin as a suitable substitute for baby skin. Results showed significantly less irritation when using Huggies(R) Zinc Enriched layer vs control
  • Huggies most advanced skin protection for delicate newborn skin

  • Clinically proven liner* enriched with Zinc Oxide (commonly found in nappy rash cream) to help protect against skin irritation.

  • Drytouch(R) layer and wide pocket waistband to absorb and lock away runny poo.

  • Breathe Dry(R) technology that allows air to circulate around baby's skin

  • Handy 'Wetness' and 'Size Up' indicators to help parents navigate change time

  • Super cute Disney Designs.

  • Endorsed by the Australian College of Midwives.

  • Available in unisex Nappies Sizes 1-3.
name: Infant Nappies Size 2 (4-8kg)

description: RASCALS PREMIUM NAPPY PANTS SIZE 5 (13-18KG) 26 PACK
long_description:
Rascals Premium Nappy Pants help make change time easier. Our nappy pants are made with an Ultra Flex Waistband for our most comfortable fit. Our Easy On & Off Design make our nappy pants perfect for potty training.

Engineered with 6 Core Innovations for a high-performing pant, that means fewer blowouts, less mess and less stress for you.

1. UltraFlex 360 Waistband
With 15+ pieces of elastic our UltraFlex 360 Waistband offers our most comfortable fit for active babies.
2. Quick-Change Features
Made with easy-tear sides and a disposal tab for our quickest, easiest change!
3. Easy On & Off Design
With our Easy On & Off Design, our nappy pants function just like underwear to help with the transition to potty training.
4. AirSpun Softness
Using AirSpun Technology our pants materials are hot-air bonded for a breathable, feather-soft feel that is gentle on skin.
5. Unique Hydrolock Core
Our Hydrolock Core holds 25x its weight for 12 hours of advanced leak protection [1,2].
6. Zero Nasties
Clinically proven safe on sensitive skin, our pants materials are free from 100+ harmful substances.

Don't just take our word for it, Rascals products are loved by millions of parents around the world with 210,000+ 5-star reviews! [3]

Try Rascals Premium Nappy Pants! Our #1 fit for active babies [4].
Available from size 4-7.

  • Easy-Tear Sides

long_description:

Featuring Thintech with Rapid Absorbency, our thinnest pant yet looks and fits like real undies while providing overnight protection for an uninterrupted sleep. With fun Disney designs your child will love!

long_description:

  • Adjustable Fit- stretchy, easy open sides for a snug fit and easy removal.

  • Traps solid mess- Outstanding Protection with leak guards and stretchy waistband to gently hug baby, ensuring no little accidents escape.

  • Wont Swell in Water - Made with unique absorbent material that won't swell in water, so your swimmer can focus on fun!

  • Designed for all swimming occasions - Perfect for the beach, swimming lessons, a friends pool or even under the sprinkler!

  • Fun Summer Designs - Make a splash with Moana 2 designs for boys and girls

  • Recommended by AUSTSWIM - AUSTSWIM recommends Huggies Little Swimmers Disposable Swim Pants for a clean, safe and fun summer season on the beach and in the pool!.

description: RASCALS PREMIUM SWIM PANTS SMALL (6-11KG) 16 PACK
long_description:
Splash into summer with NEW Rascals Swim Pants! Rascals Swim Pants don't swell in water like regular nappies, designed for a comfortable fit when your little one is wet or dry. 

1. No Swell Core
Rascals Swim Pants don't swell in water like regular nappies. They are designed for a comfortable fit when your little one is wet or dry, perfect for summer trips to the pool or beach!
2. Triple Leak Guards
Made with Triple Leak Guards to keep messes contained, the main function of our Rascals Premium Swim Pants is to keep solids contained while your little one plays in and out of the water.
3. Easy Tear Sides
Our Easy-Tear Sides make for easy removal. Simply tear the sides of the pant to remove, and roll up for easy disposal.
4. Extra Stretchy Waistband
Rascals Swim Pants are designed like nappy pants, with an Extra-Stretchy Waistband so your little one can step into the pant and simply pull it up to wear.
5. Soft and Comfy Fit
Made to be soft and comfortable when your little one is wet or dry.
6. Fun CoComelon print!
Featuring JJ & friends in our fun CoComelon print, your little one is going to love playtime all summer long!

Try Rascals Premium Swim Pants today!
Available in sizes S, M and L.
  • No Swell Core

  • Triple Leak Guards

  • Easy Tear Sides

  • Extra Stretchy Waistband

  • Soft and Comfy Fit

  • Fun CoComelon print!.
name: Premium Swim Pants Small (6-11kg)

description: HUGGIES ULTIMATE WIPES NOURISH & CARE WIPES 64PK
long_description:
HUGGIES Ultimate Baby Wipes are our Best care for skin. With Vitamin E & Shea Butter, our 4 in 1 skincare formulation helps clean, hydrate, soothe & nourish. We add up to 70% skin loving, natural wood pulp fibres~ and ensure each wipe is made without added nasties^. Our 25%* thicker wipes, provide superior absorbency and a thorough clean to help protect baby's sensitive skin and promote healthy bums.

~ Wipe made with 70% wood pulp fibres.
^ No parabens, soap, MI, alcohol (means ethanol and isopropanol), phenoxyethanol or other chemicals restricted by Kimberly-Clark - see http://www.huggies.com.au/noaddednasties
* Than regular HUGGIES Baby Wipes.
  • with vitamin E & shea butter

  • 4-in-1 skin care

  • skin loving natural fibres~~wipes made with 70% wood pulp fibres.

  • suitable for sensitive skin

  • dermatologically tested

  • hypoallergenic.
name: Ultimate Wipes Nourish & Care Wipes

description: CUB GENTLE CARE PREMIUM THICK & SOFT FRAGRANCE FREE BABY WIPES 80 PACK
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Benzoate, Propylene Glycol, Citric Acid, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Sodium Cocamidopropyl PG-Dimonium Chloride Phosphate, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Shea Butter Glycereth-8 Esters, Panthenol, Calendula Officinalis Extract.
long_description: We're here to help you protect and care for your little cub as they play, learn and grow. Our range has been carefully developed with high quality ingredients and materials that are rigorously tested. These thick and soft wipes are made with mild ingredients to be as gentle as cotton wool and water. Hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested, perfect for newborn or delicate skin.
name: Gentle Care Premium Thick & Soft Fragrance Free Baby Wipes

description: TOOSHIES ECO WIPES ALOE VERA & CHAMOMILE 70PK
ingredients: Aqua glycerin (plant based moisturiser), silver citrate (gentle preservative), sodium citrate (plant based antioxidant), citric acid (plant based stabiliser), glyceryl caprylate (naturally derived), aloe barbadensis leaf juice powder (organic), chamomilla recutita flower extract (organic), pelargonium graveolens flower oil (rose geranium oil)
long_description:
Babies' skin is ten times thinner than adults, and as such is sensitive and prone to irritation, which is why tooshies choose to leave out the nasties. The ingredients in our wipes are 99.9% natural, the wipe cloth itself is made from 100% plant-based fibres and is biodegradable.

The organic aloe vera in our wet wipes provide a cooling quality to your baby's skin. Aloe vera is known for its anti-inflammatory and nappy rash fighting properties. Combined with the soothing and calming qualities of chamomile, you get a nourishing, fresh and non-irritating baby wipe, helpful for every one of life's messes.

This convenient single pack of 70 wipes comes with a ‘one hand' open lid and is great for use at home or when you're on-the-go in your car or pram.
  • 100% plastic free

  • Biodegradable and compostable

  • 0% alcohol, phenols, phthalates, parabens

  • Unique textured plant based cloth for a pure clean from head to toe

  • Made with nourishing organic ingredients: organic Aloe Vera and Chamomile

  • Hypoallergenic, vegan, not tested on animals.

  • Infused with Rose Germanium.

  • Large one-hand open lid.
name: Eco Wipes Aloe Vera & Chamomile

description: HUGGIES WATER WIPES 72PK
long_description:

Your skin is so delicate, which is why Huggies PURE 99% Purified Water Baby Wipes is perfect for you. With 99% purified water, a splash of baby friendly essentials and no added preservatives. It is dermatologically tested for delicate skin.


*Wipes made with 70% wood pulp fibres.

  • Dermatologically tested for delicate skin

description: WATERWIPES BABY & NEWBORN SENSITIVE WIPES 180 PACK
ingredients: Water (Aqua) 99.9%, Citrus Grandis (grapefruit) seed extract*. *Contains trace of Benzalkonium Chloride
long_description:
WaterWipes™ Baby & Newborn Sensitive Wipes are the world's purest wipes for sensitive skin*. Designed to gently clean, care and help protect sensitive skin - now with a 2X stronger† wipe that's thicker and softer with a fresh new look.


  • PACKAGING MAY VARY: As we refine our wipes and uphold our commitment to purity, you may receive a different package, but inside the gentle, water-based wipes are crafted with the same formula and care you know, trust, and love.

  • FOR EVERYDAY NAPPY CHANGES: Crafted to gently clean and help protect premature, infant and newborn skin.

  • PURE & GENTLE INGREDIENTS: WaterWipes™ Sensitive Newborn & Baby Wipes are formulated with just two ingredients - 99.9% purified water and a drop of fruit extract - they gently cleanse and help protect sensitive skin.

  • 2X STRONGER†: Upgraded for more versatility, WaterWipes™ are now thicker, softer & 2X stronger† to tackle tougher messes while keeping the same, trusted purity.

  • EVERYDAY USE ON SENSITIVE SKIN: When life plays dirty, WaterWipes™ plays it clean. Ideal for cleaning small messes and refreshing skin on-the-go, these disposable wipes make the perfect daily essential.

  • 3-IN-1 SKIN CARE BENEFITS: Made using minimal ingredients, our wipes have a neutral pH range, which helps protect the natural skin barrier.

  • PURE & GENTLE FORMULA: WaterWipes™ unique 7 stage water purification, requires minimum ingredients, with 0% fragrance and alcohol^.

  • DERMATOLOGICALLY & PAEDIATRICIAN APPROVED: Gentle enough for eczema-prone and sensitive skin, WaterWipes™ are approved by dermatologists and paediatricians through the Skin Health Alliance, accepted by the Eczema Association Australasia, and registered with The Vegan Society.

  • PLANT BASED WIPES**: Made from plant-based materials, these wipes are gentle on skin and the planet.

*Visit waterwipes.com/claims-verification for claims comparison verification


†material than previous WaterWipes™


**Wipe made from regenerated cellulose (viscose) utilizing wood pulp as a precursor. For more information see our website.


^No ethanol.
name: Baby & Newborn Sensitive Wipes

description: THANKYOU THICK & SOFT BABY WIPES 240 PACK
ingredients: Purified Water, Glycerin, Lauryl Glucoside, Symphytum Officinale (Comfrey) Extract, Olea Europaea Fruit (Olive) Oil, Citric Acid, Polyglyceryl-2-Dipolyhydroxystearate, Glyceryl Oleate, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Polyhexamethylene Biguanide, Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Potassium Sorbate.
long_description: What's better than a pack of wipes that is fragrance free, hypoallergenic, super thick, incredibly soft, made from artesian water-based and natural ingredients, and hyper gentle on skin? THREE packs of wipes that are fragrance free, hypoallergenic, super thick, incredibly soft and natural ingredients, and hyper gentle on skin!
name: Thick & Soft Baby Wipes

description: APTAMIL GOLD+ 2 BABY FOLLOW-ON FORMULA FROM 6-12 MONTHS 900G
ingredients: Milk solids, vegetable oils (emulsifier (soy lecithin), antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate)), short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), dried omega LCPUFAs (fish oil contains milk, antioxidant (sodium ascorbate, mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate, dl-alpha tocopherol), whey protein (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin)), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, taurine, choline, Bifidobacterium breve M-16V, L-carnitine, inositol. Minerals: Potassium, calcium, chloride, phosphorus, sodium, magnesium, iron, zinc, copper, iodine, manganese, selenium. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, C, D, E, K), folic acid, biotin. Aptamil Gold+ Follow-On Formula is based on cows' milk protein.
long_description:
Aptamil understands not all babies are the same. Every family and every feeding journey is unique. 

That's why we developed Aptamil Gold+ 2, our premium follow-on formula, containing our scientifically researched ingredients backed by over 50 years of advanced breast milk research. 

Suitable for formula-fed infants from 6 months, our trusted scientific formulation is designed to support the nutritional needs of your growing baby. 

- Contains scientifically researched ingredients 
- Supports nutritional needs of babies from 6 months 
- Nutritional support when introducing solids 
- Suitable for mixed feeding 

Available in packs of 4 single-use sachets.

Not suitable for infants with cow's milk protein allergies, lactose intolerance and galactosaemia.
name: Gold+ 2 Baby Follow - On Formula From 6-12 Months

description: APTAMIL GOLD+ 4 JUNIOR NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENT FROM 2 YEARS 900G
ingredients: Milk solids, maltodextrin, vegetable oils (emulsifier (soy lecithin), antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate)), short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), dried omega LCPUFAs (fish oil contains milk, antioxidant (sodium ascorbate, mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate, dl-alpha tocopherol), whey protein (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin)), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, emulsifier (soy lecithin), Bifidobacterium breve M-16V. Minerals: Calcium, phosphorus, magnesium, iron, zinc, iodine Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, C, D, E), folic acid.
long_description:
Aptamil understands not all children are the same. Every family and every feeding journey is unique. 

Backed by 50 years of early life nutrition research Aptamil Gold+ 4, our premium junior nutritional supplement is suitable for children from 2 years.  
 
Our scientifically tailored formulation contains a unique prebiotic and probiotic blend, vitamins B6 and B12 for normal immune system function, iron and iodine for normal cognitive function, calcium and Vitamin D for normal teeth and bone structure and 16 essential vitamins and minerals for trusted immune system support*. 

- Immune system function support with 8 immunity nutrients: zinc, iron, folate, and vitamins A, B6, B12, C and D* 
- Cognitive function: contains iron & iodine for normal cognitive function* 
- Enriched with our unique prebiotic & probiotic blend 
- Digestive function: contains calcium which contributes to digestive enzyme function* 
- Supports normal growth & development with 16 essential vitamins and minerals* 
- No sucrose or artificial colours 
- With the goodness of cow's milk 

Suitable for toddlers from 2 years whose nutritional intake may be inadequate.  

Not suitable for toddlers with cow's milk protein allergies, lactose intolerance and galactosaemia. 

*When prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet.
name: Gold+ 4 Junior Nutritional Supplement From 2 Years

long_description:
Aptamil understands not all babies are the same. Every family and every feeding journey is unique. 

That's why we created Aptamil Gold+ 1, a nutritionally complete premium infant formula backed by over 50 years of advanced breast milk research.  

Suitable for infants from birth to 6 months, our trusted scientific formulation is designed to meet the nutritional needs of your growing baby. 

- Contains scientifically researched ingredients 
- Nutritionally complete from birth to 6 months 
- Available in packs of 5 single-use sachets 

Not suitable for infants with cow's milk protein allergies, lactose intolerance and galactosaemia.
name: Gold+ 1 Baby Infant Formula From 0-6 Months

description: ALULA GOLD TODDLER 1 YEAR+ MILK DRINK 900G
ingredients: Milk Solids, Vegetable Oils (Including Soybean), Long-Chain Polyunsaturated Fatty Acids From Single-Cell Sources (Docosahexaenoic Acid [DHA], Contains Milk), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Lutein, Antioxidants (Mixed Tocopherols Concentrate, Ascorbyl Palmitate). Minerals: Calcium, Phosphorus, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc, Iodine. Vitamins: Vitamin C, Vitamin E, Niacin, Vitamin B2, Vitamin A, Vitamin D, Folic Acid, Vitamin B6, Vitamin B1, Vitamin B12.
long_description:
At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe nutrition, science and care are important for early life. The Alula Toddler & Junior range of quality products provides age-appropriate nutrition for children, combining both scientifically researched ingredients and care for your child.

Alula Gold Toddler Premium Milk Drink
Our premium toddler formulation, carefully formulated as a supplementary milk drink for toddlers. It is a good source of 16 key vitamins and minerals plus it contains Omega 3 DHA and lutein.

- Immune support from 8 nutrients (As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. When intakes of energy and nutrients may not be adequate. See above for details)
- 16 nutrients for toddlers' growth & development (As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. When intakes of energy and nutrients may not be adequate. See above for details)
- Plant-based Omega 3 DHA & Lutein

Our premium toddler milk drink
One 220mL serve contains many essential nutrients to help support:

Immune Support
Vitamins (A, B6, B12, C, D), Folate, Iron & Zinc for immune system function.

Growth & Development
Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B6, B12, C, D, E), Niacin, Folate, Calcium, Phosphorus, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc
& Iodine for toddlers' growth & development.

Cognitive Function
Iodine & Zinc to aid cognitive function, and Iron to help support toddlers' cognitive development.

Eye Care & Support
Rich in Vitamin A, B2 & Zinc to support normal vision.

Karicare Toddler Milk Drink Stage 4 is crafted with the natural goodness of real New Zealand milk, sourced from local farms with no added preservatives or artificial flavours.
  • Contains unique blend of prebiotics from natural sources.
  • 16 vitamins and minerals, including Iron, Zinc and Calcium to support normal growth and development in toddlers*

*Specially designed to supplement the normal dietary needs of toddlers, when their intake of energy and nutrients may not be adequate.

Karicare Infant Formula Stage 1 is crafted with the natural goodness of real New Zealand milk, sourced from local farms with no added preservatives or artificial flavours. Our essential ingredients are carefully blended to create a nutritionally complete infant formula that provides wholesome, gentle nutrition for your happy thriving little one.
  • Gentle nutrition. Made for Happy little tummies
  • Nutritionally complete, wholesome formula
  • Made with the goodness of real New Zealand milk
  • No added preservatives or artificial flavours

long_description:
At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe nutrition, science and care are important for early life. The Alula Toddler & Junior range of quality products provides age-appropriate nutrition for children, combining both scientifically researched ingredients and care for your child.

Alula Gold Junior Premium Milk Drink
Our premium junior formulation, designed as a supplementary milk drink for young children.
A good source of 16 key vitamins & minerals plus it contains prebiotic FOS, Omega 3 DHA and lutein.

- Immune support from 8 nutrients (As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. When intakes of energy and nutrients may not be adequate. See above for details)
- 16 nutrients for childrens' growth & development (As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. When intakes of energy and nutrients may not be adequate. See above for details)
- Plant-based Omega 3 DHA & Lutein

Our premium junior milk drink
One 225mL serve contains many essential nutrients to help support:

Immune Support
Vitamins (A, B6, B12, C, D), Folate, Iron & Zinc for immune system function.

Growth & Development
Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B6, B12, C, D, E), Niacin, Folate, Calcium, Phosphorus, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc & Iodine for childrens' growth & development.

Cognitive Function
Iodine & Zinc to aid cognitive function, & Iron to help support childrens' cognitive development.

Eye Care & Support
Rich in Vitamin A, B2 & Zinc to support normal vision.
name: Gold Junior 2 Years+ Milk Drink

description: BIOSTIME SN-2 BIO PLUS HPO TODDLER MILK DRINK 12+ MONTHS 800G
ingredients: Milk Solids (Skim Milk, Lactose, Whey Protein), Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed Oil, Coconut Oil, Sunflower Oil, Soybean Oil, Antioxidant [Ascorbyl Palmitate]), Galacto-oligosaccharides (GOS) (From Milk), Arachidonic Acid (ARA), Docosahexaenoic Acid (DHA) (From Fish), Fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Culture (Bifidobacterium infantis^). Minerals: Calcium, Iodine, Iron, Magnesium, Phosphorus, Zinc. Vitamins: Folic Acid, Niacin, Riboflavin, Thiamin, Vitamin A, Vitamin B6, Vitamin B12, Vitamin C, Vitamin D, Vitamin E.
long_description:
Biostime SN-2 BIO PLUS HPO Toddler Milk Drink is our premium Australian made formulation, containing an advanced blend of prebiotics, as well as a probiotic found naturally in the digestive tract of breast-fed infants.

It also contains Omega-3 DHA, along with 16 essential vitamins & minerals to support your toddler's immune system function, and healthy growth & development. It has a naturally smooth and creamy taste and contains no artificial colours or flavours.

Biostime SN-2 BIO PLUS HPO Toddler Milk Drink is palm oil free and formulated to Australia's highest quality standards using Australian cow's milk.

Supports your toddler's:
  • Digestive System
    With Calcium, contributing to the normal function of digestive enzymes.
  • Cognitive Function
    With Iron, which contributes to normal cognitive function.
  • Immune System Function
    With Vitamins B6, B12, C and Zinc to support normal immune system function.
  • Healthy & Strong Bones
    With Calcium & Vitamin D to help support bone structure.
  • Harnesses the Power of Oligosaccharides (HPO): Combining prebiotic oligosaccharides with probiotics for an advanced synbiotic blend^.

  • Hygiene and Convenience: Lid includes a handy & hygienic holder for scoop.

  • Palm Oil Free

  • Smooth & Creamy Taste

  • No artificial colours or flavours.

  • Made in Sydney, Australia: Using milk from Australian dairy farms in Gippsland..
name: Sn-2 Bio Plus Hpo Toddler Milk Drink 12+months

long_description:
We believe balanced nutrition is important for growth and development. Sanulac Nutritionals Australia is committed to bringing you the latest nutritional science for your child.

Alula Advance+ Toddler Premium Milk Drink

Lovingly crafted with NZ full cream milk and no added sugar, Alula Advance+ Toddler is our most advanced milk drink for children 1 year+. Formulated with prebiotic FOS for digestive well-being* and 8 key nutrients for immune support*.

  • Prebiotic FOS

  • Good source of 8 nutrients for immune system function*

  • Plant-based Omega 3 DHA & Lutein

  • No added sugar

*As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

  • Digestive support for happy tummies from Prebiotic FOS: The Prebiotic FOS in 2x serves per day of Alula Advance+ Toddler promotes growth of beneficial gut bacteria in healthy children.

  • Immune System Function: Vitamins (A, B6, B12, C, D), folate, iron, zinc for immune system function.

  • Cognitive Development: Iron to help support toddlers' cognitive development.

  • Growth and Development: Rich in Calcium & Vitamin D necessary for strong bones & teeth and children's growth and development.

  • *As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

ingredients: Milk powder, galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), prebiotic fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), omega 3 docosahexaenoic acid (DHA) (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin), lutein, antioxidants (mixed tocopherols concentrate, ascorbyl palmitate). Alula Advance+ Junior Premium Milk Drink has no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.
long_description:
We believe balanced nutrition is important for growth and development. Sanulac Nutritionals Australia is committed to bringing you the latest nutritional science for your child.

Alula Advance+ Junior Premium Milk Drink
Lovingly crafted with NZ full cream milk and no added sugar, Alula Advance+ Junior is our most advanced milk drink for children 2 years+. Formulated with 8 key nutrients for immune support^ plus added prebiotics FOS & GOS and plant-based omega 3 DHA & lutein.

Made with full cream NZ milk

  • Prebiotics FOS & GOS

  • Good source of 8 nutrients for immune system function*

  • Good source of Omega 3 DHA

  • No added sugar

*As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

Our most advanced formulation

Alula Advance+ Junior Premium Milk Drink

  • Immune System Function: Vitamins (A, B6, B12, C, D), folate, iron, zinc for immune system function.

  • Digestive Function: Calcium to contribute to the function of digestive enzymes aiding digestion.

  • Strong Teeth and Bones: Rich in calcium & vitamin D necessary for strong teeth & bones and children's growth and development.

  • Cognitive Function: Iron, iodine and zinc for cognitive function.

*As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

  • Prebiotics FOS & GOS

  • Immune support from zinc^

  • Omega 3 DHA

  • No added sugar

description: APTAMIL GOLD+ 3 TODDLER NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENT FROM 1 YEAR 900G
ingredients: Milk solids, maltodextrin, vegetable oils (emulsifier (soy lecithin), antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate)), short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), dried omega LCPUFAs (fish oil contains milk, antioxidant (sodium ascorbate, mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate, dl-alpha tocopherol), whey protein (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin)), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, emulsifier (soy lecithin), Bifidobacterium breve M-16V. Minerals: Calcium, phosphorus, magnesium, iron, zinc, iodine. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, C, D, E), folic acid.
long_description:
Aptamil understands not all children are the same. Every family and every feeding journey is unique. 
 
Backed by 50 years of early life nutrition research Aptamil Gold+ 3, our premium toddler nutritional supplement is suitable for children from 1 year old.  
 
Our scientifically tailored formulation provides trusted immune system support with 16 essential vitamins and minerals for normal growth and development in children^. 
 
- Enriched with our unique prebiotic & probiotic blend 
- Immune system function support with 8 immunity nutrients: zinc, iron, folate, and vitamins A, B6, B12, C and D* 
- Cognitive function: contains iron & iodine for normal cognitive function* 
- Digestive function: contains calcium which contributes to digestive enzyme function* 
- Supports normal growth & development with 16 essential vitamins and minerals* 
- No sucrose or artificial colours 
- With the goodness of cow's milk  

Available in packs of 4 single-use sachets.
 
Suitable for toddlers from 1 year whose nutritional intake may be inadequate.  

Not suitable for toddlers with cow's milk protein allergies, lactose intolerance and galactosaemia. 

*When prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet.

description: ALULA GENTLE TODDLER 1 YEAR+ MILK DRINK 900G
ingredients: Milk solids, vegetable oils (including soybean), emulsifier (soy lecithin), antioxidants (mixed tocopherols concentrate, ascorbyl palmitate). Minerals: Calcium, phosphorus, magnesium, iron, zinc, iodine. Vitamins: Vitamin C, vitamin E, niacin, vitamin A, vitamin D, folic acid, vitamin B6, vitamin B12, vitamin B1, vitamin B2. Contains milk and soy. Alula Gentle Toddler Milk Drink has no artificial colours, preservatives or flavours and does not contain sucrose.
long_description:
At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe nutrition, science and care are important for early life. The Alula Toddler & Junior range of quality products provides age-appropriate nutrition for children, combining both scientifically researched ingredients and care for your child.

Alula Gentle Toddler Milk Drink

A nutritious milk drink for toddlers from 12 months. Carefully formulated as a supplementary milk drink, it's a good source of key vitamins and minerals for your growing toddler*

  • Omega-3 fatty acids

  • Zinc & Vitamin C for Immune support*

  • No added preservatives

  • Good source of iron

Simple goodness with key nutrients

One 220mL serve contains many essential nutrients to help support:

  • Growth & Development: With Iron & Iodine to help support toddlers' growth and development, plus calcium & vitamin D to help support bone structure.

  • Immune Support: With Zinc and vitamin C to help support immune system function.

  • Cognitive Function: With iodine and zinc to help support cognitive function.

  • Digestive Function: With Calcium, which contributes to the function of digestive enzymes. Digestive enzymes facilitate digestion.

*As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

When it's time to progress: 2+Years: Alula Gold Junior Milk Drink - Carefully formulated as a premium supplementary drink for young children.

  • Simple goodness with key nutrients

  • Iron and Iodine for toddlers' growth*

  • Calcium for strong bones & teeth*

  • Made in New Zealand

  • *As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

long_description:
Nutritionally tailored for toddlers. 

At Nutricia, we understand that not all children are the same. Every family and every parenting experience is unique. 

Backed by over 50 years of early life nutrition research, we have developed Aptamil Gold+ 3, a scientifically tailored formulation containing essential vitamins and minerals to support normal growth and development in children (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet).

Aptamil Gold+ 3

Nutritionally supports the immune system (contains Vitamins B6 & B12 for normal immune function)

Aptamil Gold+ 3 is a premium nutritional supplement suitable from 1 year old. 

The formulation contains our unique prebiotic and probiotic blend. This supplement is nutritionally tailored for toddlers, with Vitamin B6 & B12 for normal immune function (vitamins B6 & B12 for normal immune function ) and Iron & Iodine for normal cognitive function (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet). It contains 16 essential vitamins and minerals to support growth and development in children (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet). 

Aptamil Gold+ 3
- Our unique prebiotic & probiotic blend
- Vitamins B6 & B12 for normal immune function (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet)
- Iron & Iodine for normal cognitive function (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet)
- Calcium & Vitamin D for normal teeth and bone structure (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet)
- Omega-3 DHA

To find out more please go to:

www.aptaclub.co.nz

Minerals: Potassium, Calcium, Chloride, Phosphorus, Sodium, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc, Copper, Iodine, Manganese, Selenium. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, C, D, E K), Folic Acid, Biotin. Aptamil Gold+ Follow On Formula is based on cow's milk protein.
long_description:
A premium formula for your growing baby. 

At Nutricia, we understand that not all babies are the same. 
Every family and every parenting experience is unique. 

Backed by over 50 years of advanced breast milk research, we have developed Aptamil Gold+ 2, a scientifically tailored formulation to support the nutritional needs of your growing baby (as part of a mixed diet). 

Aptamil Gold+ 2

Our nutritionally tailored formula

Inspired by our scientific discoveries, we have developed Aptamil Gold+ 2, a premium formula suitable for formula-fed infants from 6 months, containing scientifically researched ingredients designed to support your baby's nutritional needs. 

Aptamil Gold+ 2
- Scientifically researched ingredients
- Supports nutritional needs of infants (as part of a mixed diet)
- Suitable for mixed feeding

To find out more please go to: 
www.aptaclub.com.au
www.aptaclub.co.nz
name: Gold+ Pronutra Follow on Sachet

description: KARICARE FOLLOW ON FORMULA
ingredients: Milk Solids, Vegetable Oils (Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Antioxidant (Ascorbyl Palmitate)), Short Chain Galacto-Oligosaccharides (Milk), Dried Omega LCPUFAs (Fish Oil Contains Milk, Antioxidant (Sodium Ascorbate, Mixed Tocopherols, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Dl-Alpha Tocopherol), Whey Protein (Milk), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin)), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Long Chain Fructo-Oligosaccharides, Taurine, Choline Chloride, L-Carnitine, Inositol. Minerals: Potassium, Calcium, Chloride, Phosphorus, Sodium, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc, Copper, Iodine, Manganese, Selenium. Vitamins: (A, B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, C, D, E, K), Folic Acid, Biotin. Karicare Follow On Formula is based on cows' milk protein.
long_description:
Karicare Follow-On Formula Stage 2 is crafted with the natural goodness of real New Zealand milk, sourced from local farms with no added preservatives or artificial flavours. Our essential ingredients are carefully blended to create a follow-on formula that to support your little one's nutritional needs* whilst providing wholesome, gentle nutrition for your happy thriving little one.
  • Gentle nutrition. Made for Happy little tummies
  • Support nutritional needs as a part of mixed diet
  • Made with the goodness of real New Zealand milk
  • No added preservatives or artificial flavours
*as part of a mixed diet
name: 2 Baby Follow-on Formula From 6-12 Months

description: APTAMIL GOLD+ REFLUX FORMULA 900G
ingredients: Milk solids, vegetable oils (emulsifier (soy lecithin), antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate)), thickener (carob bean gum), short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), dried omega LCPUFAs (fish oil, sodium caseinate (milk), antioxidant (sodium ascorbate, natural tocopherols (soy), ascorbyl palmitate, dl-alpha-tocopherol), whey protein (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin)), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, taurine, choline chloride, inositol, L-carnitine. Minerals: Potassium, calcium, chloride, phosphorus, sodium, magnesium, iron, zinc, copper, iodine, manganese, selenium. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, C, D3, E, K1), folic acid, biotin. Aptamil Gold+ Reflux Infant Formula is based on cows' milk protein.
long_description:
Aptamil Gold+ Reflux is a specialty infant formula for regurgitation or mild reflux. Babies often spit up small amounts of milk after feeding (commonly known as reflux or regurgitation). However, some babies may suffer from more frequent regurgitation. Aptamil Gold+ Reflux has been specially tailored to help reduce the severity and frequency of regurgitation episodes.

  • This formula is thickened with carob bean gum, helping the formula to stay in the stomach, which may help reduce the severity and frequency of regurgitation episodes. This is a key element for the dietary management of regurgitation or mild reflux.
  • Contains scientifically researched ingredients
  • Nutritionally complete for infants aged 0 to 6 months, or suitable for infants aged 6 to 12 months as part of a mixed diet
  • 900g tin format


Aptamil Gold+ Reflux Infant Formula is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision.
Not to be used for infants with a diagnosed cows' milk protein allergy.
name: Gold+ Reflux Baby Infant Formula Regurgitation Or Mild Reflux From Birth To 12 Months

description: APTAMIL INFANT FORMULA COLIC & CONSTIPATION
ingredients: Whey protein hydrolysate (milk), vegetable oils (antioxidant (mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate)), glucose syrup, starch, short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), maltodextrin, lactose (milk), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, omega LCPUFAs (fish oil, antioxidant (mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate)), L-tyrosine, choline chloride, taurine, inositol, antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate), L-carnitine, emulsifier (soy lecithin). Minerals: Potassium, calcium,chloride, phosphorus, sodium, iron, zinc, copper, iodine, manganese, selenium. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B1, Bs, Be, B, C, D, E, K), folic acid, biotin. Nucleotides: Cytidine-5'-monophosphate, uridine-5'-monophosphate, adenosine-5'-monophosphate, inosine-5'-monophosphate, guanosine-5'-monophosphate.
long_description:
Aptamil Gold+ Colic & Constipation is a premium specialty infant formula suitable for infants experiencing colic and/or constipation. Specially researched and developed, it contains ingredients to help ease symptoms, reduce episodes of colic, and encourage softer and more frequent stools.
  • This formula is gently broken down (partially hydrolysed) and contains ingredients specially designed for the dietary management of colic and constipation
  • Supports the reduction of colic episodes, and promotes softer, more regular stools to help manage symptoms of constipation
  • Nutritionally complete for infants aged 0 to 6 months, or suitable for infants aged 6 to 12 months as part of a mixed diet
  • 900g tin format
Aptamil Gold+ Colic & Constipation is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision. 
Not suitable for infants with confirmed cows' milk protein allergy, galactosaemia, lactose intolerance.
name: Gold+ Colic & Constipation Baby Infant Formula From Birth To 12 Months

description: KARICARE FORMULA SOYA ALL AGES
ingredients: Dried glucose syrup, vegetable oils (contains soy, emulsifier (soy lecithin)), I soy protein isolate, antioxidant (citric acid), L-methionine, choline chloride, taurine, inositol, L-carnitine. Minerals: Calcium, potassium, phosphorous, chloride, sodium, magnesium, iron, zinc, copper, manganese, iodine, selenium. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, Bi, B2, B3, Bs, Bs, B12, C, D3, E, Ki), folic acid, biotin. If correctly stored and made up in accordance with the directions contained on the label, no further vitamin or mineral preparations are necessary. Karicare Soy Protein Formula is based on Soy proteins.
long_description:
Karicare Soy Formula is based on soy proteins, and suitable from birth for infants where an alternative to cows' milk formula is required. Soy formula may be recommended by a healthcare professional for the dietary management of cows' milk allergy, usually only for babies over 6 months old, according to allergy guidelines.

At Karicare, we're committed to supporting sustainability. That's why this tin, including the lid and scoop, is recyclable. 

  • Made with non-GMO soy proteins
  • No added preservatives
  • No artificial flavours
  • Dairy-free, plant-based formula
  • Recyclable tin, lid and scoop
name: Soy Milk For All Ages

description: APTAMIL GOLD+LACTOSE INTOLERANCE BABY INFANT FORMULA FROM BIRTH TO 12 MONTHS 900G
ingredients: Glucose syrup, vegetable oils (antioxidant (citric acid)), calcium caseinate (milk), maltodextrin, omega LCPUFAs (fish oil, antioxidant (mixed tocopherols (soy), ascorbyl palmitate)), emulsifier (soy lecithin), L-cysteine, choline chloride, taurine, L-tryptophan, inositol, L-carnitine, antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate). Minerals: Potassium, calcium, chloride, phosphorus, sodium, magnesium, iron, zinc, copper, manganese, iodine, selenium. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, C, D3, E, K1), folic acid, biotin. Nucleotides: Cytidine-5'-monophosphate, uridine-5'-monophosphate, adenosine -5'-monophosphate, inosine -5'-monophosphate, guanosine-5'-monophosphate.Aptamil Gold + Lactose Intolerance Infant Formula is based on cows' milk protein.
long_description:
Aptamil Gold+ Lactose Intolerance is a premium specialty infant formula. Lactose intolerance occurs when the body cannot properly digest lactose, a sugar naturally found in milk. This formula is suitable for babies who are recovering from diarrhoea associated with lactose intolerance, it may also assist with colic or digestive discomfort stemming from undigested lactose.

  • This formula is designed to help babies with digestive discomfort (e.g. wind, diarrhoea) as a result of undigested lactose or due to lactose intolerance. This is a key element for the dietary management of lactose intolerance
  • Contains scientifically researched ingredients
  • Nutritionally complete for infants aged 0 to 6 months, or suitable for infants aged 6 to 12 months as part of a mixed diet
  • 900g tin format


Aptamil Gold+ Lactose Intolerance Infant Formula is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision. Consult your healthcare professional for advice.
Not suitable for babies with galactosaemia or with a diagnosed cows' milk allergy.
name: Gold+ Lactose Intolerance Baby Infant Formula From Birth To 12 Months

This mashed meal can also be added to home-cooked veggies for older babies who are ready for more textures. It's easy to grab for on the go, and easy to serve cold with a spoon. If your little one prefers warmer meals, the pouch can also be warmed in a bowl of hot water.
  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • No added salt

  • No preservatives

  • For ages 6 months onwards

name: Kids Banana & Strawberry Rice Pudding Pouch
description: TILDA KIDS BANANA & STRAWBERRY RICE PUDDING POUCH 125G
long_description:
Tilda?? is a multicultural British brand that has been the go-to choice for rice aficionados for 50 years. Founded back in London in 1970, we introduced Pure Basmati to rice-loving communities from around the world, who were looking for aromatic Basmati that they couldn't find in the UK at the time. Today we are proud to sit at the heart of many dinner tables with our wide, delicious range including many Tilda?? dry rice varieties as well as Tilda?? Microwave Rice, and Tilda?? Kids. All Tilda products are made with carefully sourced, natural ingredients so they're all nutritionally balanced and packed with natural goodness. By removing broken and inferior grains we make sure that our rice cooks up perfectly.

Perfect for children who are weaned and happily eating solid food, our Tilda Kids range has been especially developed with younger palates in mind. Every pouch is bursting with yummy, natural ingredients with nothing artificial so whether it be our delicious range of rice and vegetables or our tasty rice puddings, you're in safe hands with us. All variants are gluten free and vegetarian. The perfect cupboard essential for busy parents.

NEW Tilda Kids Rice Puddings are the perfect cupboard essential for a quick and easy snack or after dinner treat. Warm it up or eat it cold - they are delicious at any temperature, on their own, or with fresh fruit! Our rice puddings are super tasty for all children, including those that are dairy free, gluten free and vegetarian.
ingredients: Natural Basmati Rice - Steamed (55%), Banana Puree (28%), Strawberry Puree (8%), Rice Syrup, Vegetable Oils (Sunflower, Rapeseed), Natural Flavouring, Salt.

name: Kids Sunshine Vegetable Rice Pouch
description: TILDA KIDS SUNSHINE VEGETABLE RICE POUCH 125G
long_description:
Tilda?? is a multicultural British brand that has been the go-to choice for rice aficionados for 50 years. Founded back in London in 1970, we introduced Pure Basmati to rice-loving communities from around the world, who were looking for aromatic Basmati that they couldn't find in the UK at the time. Today we are proud to sit at the heart of many dinner tables with our wide, delicious range including many Tilda?? dry rice varieties as well as Tilda?? Microwave Rice, and Tilda?? Kids. All Tilda products are made with carefully sourced, natural ingredients so they're all nutritionally balanced and packed with natural goodness. By removing broken and inferior grains we make sure that our rice cooks up perfectly.

Perfect for children who are weaned and happily eating solid food, our Tilda Kids range has been especially developed with younger palates in mind. Every pouch is bursting with yummy, natural ingredients with nothing artificial so whether it be our delicious range of rice and vegetables or our tasty rice puddings, you're in safe hands with us. All variants are gluten free and vegetarian. The perfect cupboard essential for busy parents.

Tilda Kids rice and vegetables has lots of hidden veggies meaning every pack counts as 1 of your child's 5-a-day! Delicious on their own or with chicken, fish, meatballs or more vegetables, they are ready in only 40 seconds in the microwave or just 3 minutes in a pan. Mealtimes really can be easy, tasty, and healthy too!

name: Veggie Straws
description: KIDDYLICIOUS VEGGIE STRAWS 12G
long_description:
Introducing Kiddylicious Veggie Straws - the perfect finger food for your little ones! These delicious straws are suitable for kids and toddlers aged 12 months and above, designed to support your little one's development and encourage self-feeding. With their hollow middle and fun tube shapes, Kiddylicious Straws are the perfect shape and texture for developing mouths.

We understand snacks can play a positive part in your little ones' development, helping to shape a healthy attitude towards food and healthy eating.

With Kiddylicious, you can trust that you are giving your child a nutritious and tasty snack option. So grab a pack of Kiddylicious Veggie Straws and let your little ones enjoy a flavourful snack!
  • Portion sized Veggie Straws - Crunchy straws providing a convenient & controlled way to satisfy your child's snack cravings. Each pack is perfectly portioned for children of 12+ months, ensuring they can enjoy a tasty treat in just the right amount.

  • Yummy finger food - tomato, kale and spinach flavoured potato snacks. A tasty and nutritious snack for babies and kids made from a blend of rice and pea, with added vegetable powders. Perfect for on-the-go snacking.

  • Bite-sized for little hands - Encouraging self feeding, perfect for practicing pincer grip and hand to mouth coordination. These straws are a delicious and convenient choice for children 12+ months.

  • At home or on-the-go - perfect for busy parents looking for a tasty & easy snack option for their kids. Whether an after-school treat or a lunchtime snack, these delicious snacks are fit for any occasion. Just grab a pack and go!

  • Allergen friendly range - suitable for vegans and vegetarians. Gluten free, milk free, egg free. No artificial flavours, only natural flavours. No artificial colours or added preservatives as in all baby foods.
ingredients: Potato Starch (32%), canola oil, rice flour (20%), yellow pea flour (19%), salt, tomato powder (0.4%), kale powder (0.3%), spinach powder (0.3%), beetroot powder (0.1%)

  • Perfect finger food for toddlers

  • Portion controlled to enjoy in between meals, at home or on the go

  • Allergen friendly range - suitable for milk intolerant and vegans. Milk free, nut free, egg free, no added salt, no artificial flavours, colours or added preservatives.

name: Veggie Straws Cheesy Flavour
description: KIDDYLICIOUS VEGGIE STRAWS CHEESY FLAVOUR 4 PACK
long_description:
Introducing Kiddylicious Cheesy Veggie Straws - the perfect finger food for your little ones! These delicious straws are suitable for kids and toddlers aged 12 months and above, designed to support your little one's development and encourage self-feeding. With their hollow middle and fun tube shapes, Kiddylicious Straws are the perfect shape and texture for developing mouths.

We understand snacks can play a positive part in your little ones' development, helping to shape a healthy attitude towards food and healthy eating.

Each pack contains 4 convenient packs. Our snacks come wrapped in portion-controlled packs, ensuring you are giving just the right amount. Ideal for at home or on the go, perfect for busy parents and active kids. Why settle for boring and unhealthy snacks when you can give your child Kiddylicious Veggie Straws?

With Kiddylicious, you can trust that you are giving your child a nutritious and tasty snack option. So grab a pack of Kiddylicious Veggie Straws and let your little ones enjoy a flavourful snack!
  • Portion sized Cheesy Straws - Crunchy straws providing a convenient & controlled way to satisfy your child's snack cravings. Each pack is perfectly portioned for children of 12+ months, ensuring they can enjoy a tasty treat in just the right amount.

  • Yummy finger food - tomato, kale and spinach flavoured potato snacks. A tasty and nutritious snack for babies and kids made from a blend of rice and pea, with added vegetable powders. Perfect for on-the-go snacking.

  • Bite-sized for little hands - Encouraging self feeding, perfect for practicing pincer grip and hand to mouth coordination. These straws are a delicious and convenient choice for children 12+ months.

  • At home or on-the-go - perfect for busy parents looking for a tasty & easy snack option for their kids. Whether an after-school treat or a lunchtime snack, these delicious snacks are fit for any occasion. Just grab a pack and go!

  • Allergen friendly range - suitable for vegans and vegetarians. Gluten free, milk free, egg free. No artificial flavours, only natural flavours. No artificial colours or added preservatives as in all baby foods.
ingredients: Potato starch (30%), canola oil, rice flour (19%), yellow pea flour (18%), cheese flavoured seasoning (rice flour, natural flavour, onion powder (0.5%), yeast extract powder), tomato powder (0.5%), salt, beetroot powder (0.2%).

name: Banana Fruity Puffs 7+ Months
description: KIDDYLICIOUS BANANA PUFFS
long_description:
Introducing Kiddylicious Banana Fruity Puffs - the perfect snack for your little ones! Made without artificial colors or preservatives, these delicious Fruity Puffs are a corn puff snack with a hint of fruit suitable for kids and toddlers aged 7 months and above. We understand snacks can play a positive part in your little ones' development, helping to shape a healthy attitude towards food and healthy eating.

Our snacks come wrapped in portion-controlled packs, ensuring you are giving just the right amount and ideal for at home or on the go to keep your little one going and growing.
So why settle for boring and unhealthy snacks when you can give your child Kiddylicious Fruity Puffs?

The convenient packaging makes it easy to take on-the-go, perfect for busy parents and active kids. With Kiddylicious, you can trust that you are giving your child a nutritious and tasty snack option. So grab a pack of Kiddylicious Banana Fruity Puffs and let your little ones enjoy a nutritious and flavourful snack!
  • Portion sized Banana Fruity Puffs - Perfect for little hands! These corn puffs with dried strawberries are perfectly portion sized to enjoy in between meals, at home or on the go. Enjoy with every bite! Ideal for kids 7+ months.

  • Yummy finger food - Delicious toddler snacks suitable for 7+ months. Tasty corn puff snacks with a hint of real fruit, light and melty for little fingers. Perfect for little hands and developing palates.

  • Bite-sized for little hands - Encouraging self feeding, with its easy to grap shape, these Fruity Puffs are a delicious and convenient choice for kids 7+ months. Kiddylicious supports developmental milestones while satisfying cravings everywhere.

  • At home or on-the-go - perfect for busy parents looking for a tasty & easy snack option for their kids. Portion controlled to enjoy in between meals, at home or on the go, these delicious snacks are fit for any occasion. Just grab a pack and go!

  • Allergen friendly range - suitable for vegetarians and a milk-free diet. Gluten free, no added salt, no artificial colours, no preservatives as in all baby foods. Only natural flavour in the Fruity Puffs.

name: Blueberry Fruity Puffs 7+ Months
description: KIDDYLICIOUS BLUEBERRY PUFFS
long_description:
Introducing Kiddylicious Blueberry Fruity Puffs - the perfect snack for your little ones! Made without artificial colors or preservatives, these delicious Fruity Puffs are a corn puff snack with a hint of fruit suitable for kids and toddlers aged 7 months and above. We understand snacks can play a positive part in your little ones' development, helping to shape a healthy attitude towards food and healthy eating.

Our snacks come wrapped in portion-controlled packs, ensuring you are giving just the right amount and ideal for at home or on the go to keep your little one going and growing.
So why settle for boring and unhealthy snacks when you can give your child Kiddylicious Fruity Puffs?

The convenient packaging makes it easy to take on-the-go, perfect for busy parents and active kids. With Kiddylicious, you can trust that you are giving your child a nutritious and tasty snack option. So grab a pack of Kiddylicious Blueberry Fruity Puffs and let your little ones enjoy a nutritious and flavourful snack!
  • Portion sized Blueberry Fruity Puffs - Perfect for little hands! These corn puffs with dried strawberries are perfectly portion sized to enjoy in between meals, at home or on the go. Enjoy with every bite! Ideal for kids 7+ months.

  • Yummy finger food - Delicious toddler snacks suitable for 7+ months. Tasty corn puff snacks with a hint of real fruit, light and melty for little fingers. Perfect for little hands and developing palates.

  • Bite-sized for little hands - Encouraging self feeding, with its easy to grap shape, these Fruity Puffs are a delicious and convenient choice for kids 7+ months. Kiddylicious supports developmental milestones while satisfying cravings everywhere.

  • At home or on-the-go - perfect for busy parents looking for a tasty & easy snack option for their kids. Portion controlled to enjoy in between meals, at home or on the go, these delicious snacks are fit for any occasion. Just grab a pack and go!

  • Allergen friendly range - suitable for vegetarians and a milk-free diet. Gluten free, no added salt, no artificial colours, no preservatives as in all baby foods. Only natural flavour in the Fruity Puffs.
ingredients: Corn flour (75%), vegetable sunflower oil, blueberry powder (10%), natural flavour, mineral (iron), vitamin (thiamin).

name: Raspberry Crispie Tiddlers 12+ Months
description: KIDDYLICIOUS RASPBERRY CRISPIE TIDDLERS
long_description:
Our Raspberry Crispy Tiddlers are made perfect for a healthy sweet treat. Made from real fruit puree and fruit juice, we whizz them up with crispy little rice pieces and then set them into these cool shapes for a delicious fruity alternative to gummy sweets. Ideal for topping tasty cakes, biscuits and desserts.Crispy Tiddlers only contain sugars that occur naturally in fruit.

Our baby finger food is made perfect for a healthy sweet treat. These yummy treats contain no added sugar, artificial flavours whatsoever and are suitable for 12+ months babies. We have several delicious flavours to choose from.
  • Portion sized and tasty fruit finger food.

  • Yummy, nutritious finger foods, designed to support your little one's development and learning to self-feed

  • Perfect finger food for toddlers

  • Portion controlled to enjoy in between meals, at home or on the go

name: Banana Fruty Puffs
description: KIDDYLICIOUS BANANA FRUTY PUFFS 4 PACK
long_description:
Introducing Kiddylicious Banana Fruity Puffs - the perfect snack for your little ones! Made without artificial colors or preservatives, these delicious Fruity Puffs are a corn puff snack with a hint of fruit suitable for kids and toddlers aged 7 months and above. We understand snacks can play a positive part in your little ones' development, helping to shape a healthy attitude towards food and healthy eating.

Each pack contains 4 convenient packs. Our snacks come wrapped in portion-controlled packs, ensuring you are giving just the right amount and ideal for at home or on the go to keep your little one going and growing.
So why settle for boring and unhealthy snacks when you can give your child Kiddylicious Fruity Puffs?

The convenient packaging makes it easy to take on-the-go, perfect for busy parents and active kids. With Kiddylicious, you can trust that you are giving your child a nutritious and tasty snack option. So grab a pack of Kiddylicious Banana Fruity Puffs and let your little ones enjoy a nutritious and flavourful snack!
  • Portion sized Banana Fruity Puffs - Perfect for little hands! These corn puffs with dried strawberries are perfectly portion sized to enjoy in between meals, at home or on the go. Enjoy with every bite! Ideal for kids 7+ months.

  • Yummy finger food - Delicious toddler snacks suitable for 7+ months. Tasty corn puff snacks with a hint of real fruit, light and melty for little fingers. Perfect for little hands and developing palates.

  • Bite-sized for little hands - Encouraging self feeding, with its easy to grap shape, these Fruity Puffs are a delicious and convenient choice for kids 7+ months. Kiddylicious supports developmental milestones while satisfying cravings everywhere.

  • At home or on-the-go - perfect for busy parents looking for a tasty & easy snack option for their kids. Portion controlled to enjoy in between meals, at home or on the go, these delicious snacks are fit for any occasion. Just grab a pack and go!

  • Allergen friendly range - suitable for vegetarians and a milk-free diet. Gluten free, no added salt, no artificial colours, no preservatives as in all baby foods. Only natural flavour in the Fruity Puffs.
ingredients: Corn flour (75%), banana powder (14%), vegetable sunflower oil, natural flavour, mineral (iron), vitamin (thiamin).

name: Veggie Straws Cheesy Flavour
description: KIDDYLICIOUS VEGGIE STRAWS CHEESY FLAVOUR 12G
long_description:
Introducing Kiddylicious Cheesy Veggie Straws - the perfect finger food for your little ones! These delicious straws are suitable for kids and toddlers aged 9 months and above, designed to support your little one's development and encourage self-feeding. With their hollow middle and fun tube shapes, Kiddylicious Straws are the perfect shape and texture for developing mouths.

We understand snacks can play a positive part in your little ones' development, helping to shape a healthy attitude towards food and healthy eating.

Our snacks come wrapped in portion-controlled packs, ensuring you are giving just the right amount. Ideal for at home or on the go, perfect for busy parents and active kids. Why settle for boring and unhealthy snacks when you can give your child Kiddylicious Veggie Straws?

With Kiddylicious, you can trust that you are giving your child a nutritious and tasty snack option. So grab a pack of Kiddylicious Veggie Straws and let your little ones enjoy a flavourful snack!
  • Portion sized Cheesy Straws - Crunchy straws providing a convenient & controlled way to satisfy your child's snack cravings. Each pack is perfectly portioned for children of 12+ months, ensuring they can enjoy a tasty treat in just the right amount.

  • Yummy finger food - tomato, kale and spinach flavoured potato snacks. A tasty and nutritious snack for babies and kids made from a blend of rice and pea, with added vegetable powders. Perfect for on-the-go snacking.

  • Bite-sized for little hands - Encouraging self feeding, perfect for practicing pincer grip and hand to mouth coordination. These straws are a delicious and convenient choice for children 12+ months.

  • At home or on-the-go - perfect for busy parents looking for a tasty & easy snack option for their kids. Whether an after-school treat or a lunchtime snack, these delicious snacks are fit for any occasion. Just grab a pack and go!

  • Allergen friendly range - suitable for vegans and vegetarians. Gluten free, milk free, egg free. No artificial flavours, only natural flavours. No artificial colours or added preservatives as in all baby foods.
ingredients: Potato starch (30%), canola oil, rice flour (19%), yellow pea flour (18%), cheese flavour seasoning (6%) (rice flour, natural flavour, onion powder (0.4%), yeast extract powder), tomato powder (0.5%), salt, beetroot powder (0.2%).

name: Cerelac Infant Cereal Multigrain With Banana & Apple Baby Food
description: NESTLE CERELAC INFANT CEREAL MULTIGRAIN WITH BANANA & APPLE BABY FOOD 200G
long_description:
Nestle CERELAC Multigrain with Banana and Apple is a nutritious baby cereal made with real fruit and mixed grains (Oats, Wheat, Corn, Barley, Rye & Spelt) introducing your baby to even more exciting new tastes and textures as they transition into baby food. This iron-fortified CERELAC infant cereal has a fine texture when prepared, making it ideal for babies from 6 months onward. CERELAC baby food facilitates a smooth transition to solid baby food and ensures a pleasant eating experience for your little one. Nestle CERELAC Multigrain with Banana and Apple baby cereal contains key ingredients to support your baby including Bifidus BL, a probiotic like those found in the digestive system of breastfed babies. This infant cereal is iron-fortified to support your baby's immune system and cognitive function*. Each serving of this baby cereal contains an average of 65% of your baby's recommended daily iron intake^, which supports their growth and development. Plus, Vitamin B6 to support your baby's growth and development, and Vitamin C to assist with iron absorption and energy metabolism. 9 serves in every pack, approx. 83c per serve based on an RRP $7.49. *Enjoy Nestle CERELAC baby food as part of a varied diet. ^Recommended dietary intake for infants 6-12 months.
  • Our CERELAC cereal is mixable with other baby food such as your baby's favourite vegetables or fruits to help introduce flavours and develop their palate.
ingredients: Wheat Flour [Processing Aid (Soy)] (46%), Wholegrain Wheat Flour (20%), Banana Flakes (Banana 10%), Oat Flour (9%), Apple Flakes (Apple 5%), Corn Flour (1.5%), Rye Flour (1.5%), Barley Flour (1.5%), Vegetable Oils, Spelt Flour (Wheat) (1%), Rice Flour (0.5%), Triticale Flour (Wheat) (0.5%), Maltodextrin, Corn Starch, Emulsifier (Lecithin), Mineral (Iron), Vitamins [C, Niacin, B6, Thiamin (B1)], Culture (Bifidobacterium lactis), Antioxidants (Mixed Tocopherols Concentrate, Ascorbyl Palmitate).

name: Cerelac Baby Rice Cereal Baby Food From 4 Months
description: NESTLE CERELAC BABY RICE CEREAL BABY FOOD FROM 6 MONTHS 200G
long_description:
Winner - 2025 TellMeBaby Consumer Award for Highest Rated Baby Cereal Nestle CERELAC Baby Rice Cereal is a nutritious option as a first cereal for babies starting solid foods. Local guidelines support the introduction of iron-rich foods, such as iron-fortified baby rice cereal, as ideal first foods. Nestle CERELAC Baby Rice Cereal contains single grains and is rich in iron to support healthy growth and development*, containing on average 33% of the RDI per serve, based on the ^recommended dietary intake for infants from 6 to 12 months of age. 13 serves in every pack, approx. 58c per serve based on an RRP $7.49. When prepared, this CERELAC stage 1 baby rice cereal has a smooth texture, which is ideal as your little ones first cereal. Nestle CERELAC baby rice cereal contains probiotic Bifidus BL like those found in the digestive system of breastfed babies and also contains Vitamin C, a key antioxidant, to support your baby's immune system functioning, growth and development*. For added variety and flavour, you can mix CERELAC Baby Rice Cereal with other baby food such as a teaspoon of your baby's preferred vegetable or fruit puree. This introduces different tastes to their diet, fostering a diverse palate as they start on their first cereal. Nestle CERELAC Baby Rice cereal is not recommended for infants under 4 months of age. *Enjoy Nestle CERELAC baby rice cereal as part of a gradual introduction to a variety of solid baby foods.
  • Mix this CERELAC rice cereal with a variety of suitable vegetables or fruits to help introduce flavours and textures to develop your baby's palate.
ingredients: Rice flour (99%) [processing aid (soy)], mineral (iron), maltodextrin, vitamin C, culture (Bifidobacterium lactis)

name: Insulated Drink Bottle Straw Top 350ml
description: B.BOX INSULATED DRINK BOTTLE STRAW TOP 350ML 1 EACH
long_description:
We've redefined cool with our new insulated drink bottle. Our newest drink bottle has insulating super powers! The double walled stainless steel keeps liquids cool for up to 8 hours and warm for up to 6, so now your little one can stay hydrated whatever the weather. Complete with carry handle and push button opening, designed specifically for little hands.

Clean modern design and big kid aesthetic. Available in six fab b.box colours. Kids love our easy drinking silicone straw top. Parents love no leaks in the bag (when the lid is closed). Replacement straw packs available, sold separately. When using to keep liquids warm - for best performance fill the stainless steel base with hot water for a few minutes to warm it before pouring water out - and filling with warm liquids.

long_description:

Complete with integrated carry handle and push button opening, designed specifically for little hands.

name: Baby Bottles Natural Start Anti-colic Bottle 260ml 0months+
description: TOMMEE TIPPEE BABY BOTTLES NATURAL START ANTI-COLIC BOTTLE 260ML 0M+ PACK OF 1
long_description:
Tommee Tippee Natural Start bottles are #1 for easily switching between breast, bottle and back again*. Our soft silicone bottle teats have a built-in anti-colic valve that's proven to reduce air intake*. Our most breast-like bottle, ever. Shaped for comfort, engineered for ease, and designed to suit your feeding routine. - Designed to help reduce nipple confusion and make switching from breast to bottle and back again, easy- 95% of babies accept a Tommee Tippee bottle*- 3-step self-sterilising1. Add 50ml of water (use the dotted line as a guide)2. Rest the assembled lid, ring and teat on top (but don't fasten)3. Microwave for 3 minutes- Leak proof with the lid on (even when upside down)- Always BPA, BPS and Phthalate free*To verify, please visit the Amazon product page
  • Natural latch: Made from soft silicone, Tommee Tippee teats are shaped like a breast to encourage a natural latch and help to prevent nipple confusion when switching between breast and bottle feeding

  • Built-in anti-colic valve: Tommee Tippee Natural Start teats have an anti-colic valve that's proven to reduce air ingestion*

  • Paced feeding: Each soft silicone baby bottle teat flexes and stretches like a breast to help your baby feed comfortably at their own pace

  • Simple self-sterilising: The quickest and easiest self-sterilising bottle on the market*, a Tommee Tippee Natural Start baby bottle can be easily self-sterilised in the microwave in just 3 minutes

  • Spill, mess and leakproof: When the screw ring, teat and cap are all secured, this Natural Start baby bottle is completely leakproof, even if it's turned upside down, shaken or dropped

name: Kids Leak Proof Drink Bottle Assorted 414ml
description: CONTIGO AUBREY KIDS LEAK PROOF DRINK BOTTLE ASSORTED 414ML 1 EACH
long_description:
Say goodbye to spills and hard-to-clean kids bottles. The Contigo Kids AUTOSPOUT Straw Drink Bottle with Easy-Clean Lid is designed to make life easier for both kids and parents. With the push of a button, kids can open the pop-up straw for simple one-handed drinking-perfect for school, daycare, sports, and days out. When they're finished, the spout easily clicks back under the cover to keep the mouthpiece clean and protected.

Parents will love the 100% spill-proof valve that prevents leaks, even when the bottle is tipped upside down. Car seats, backpacks, and lunchboxes stay dry-no matter how energetic your little one is.

Cleaning is fuss-free thanks to the Easy-Clean Lid, engineered without hidden nooks or crannies where dirt can build up. The straw disassembles quickly for a thorough clean and stays tethered so no small parts go missing. All components are top-rack dishwasher-safe for everyday convenience.

Made from durable, BPA-free materials that resist odours and tastes, this reusable kids bottle is built for daily use and backed by a lifetime guarantee. Suitable for ages 3+
  • Kid-friendly AUTOSPOUT design: Push-button pop-up straw offers easy, one-handed drinking for kids aged 3+.

  • 100% spill-proof valve: Prevents leaks and spills-even when the spout is open or the bottle is upside down.

  • Easy-Clean Lid: Thoughtfully designed with no hidden crevices where dirt and grime can collect.

  • Simple-to-clean straw: Disassembles for deep cleaning but stays tethered so no loose parts get lost.

  • Dishwasher-safe convenience: BPA-free lid and body are top-rack dishwasher-safe for quick, easy cleaning.

long_description:
Pigeon Flexible PP Bottle is a slim neck bottle for use with Pigeon Flexible Peristaltic Teats.
Made from light weight plastic (PP; polypropylene), the Flexible PP bottle is suitable for low to regular use.
The bottle is supplied with the Flexible Peristaltic teat. The teat has a slim neck, with double thickness silicone to ensure ideal softness and flexibility for latching on comfortably and easily. Each teat also features a unique venting system to minimise swallowed air and help reduce colic.
BPA and BPS free.

Insulating super powers indeed! The double walled stainless steel in our larger bottle size will help keep liquids cool for up to 15 hours and warm for up to 8 hours.

The front press button opening can be used with one hand to help with those big schoolyard thirsts and the integrated carry handle means it's always on hand.

name: Tritan Drink Bottle Straw Top 600ml
description: B.BOX TRITAN DRINK BOTTLE STRAW TOP 600ML 1 EACH
long_description:
Our unique big kids??? 600ml drink bottle is ideal for kindy and school kids. Its unique triangle shape bottle is designed specifically for little hands, making it easier for kids to grip. Better for school aged kids - this larger 600ml bottle is a little heavier than our 450ml bottle when full of liquid.

Easy push button pops open the lid, keeping straw tops hygienic when closed and never goes astray. Spill-proof bite valve straw top prevents accidental spills. Robust carry handle makes it easy for kids to carry and remove out of school bags.

Its 600ml capacity and angled silicone straw lets kids drink to the very last drop and stay hydrated throughout the day. Minimal parts and ultra easy to assemble / disassemble and clean. Dishwasher safe (top rack only). Plus, customise the look with removable bumper

name: Training Cups 240ml 12+ Months
description: B.BOX TRAINING CUPS 240ML 12+ MONTHS 1 EACH
long_description: The training cup is the ideal way for kids to learn to drink from a cup, whilst minimising spills. The training cup mimics the flow of a big kids cup, by funneling liquids into the rim for easy free-flow drinking. The cup also features a unique water window in the lid so kids can learn to see water as they're drinking and judge how much to tilt their cup. Interchangeable base and lid means you can switch between the spout, sippy cup and training lids as baby grows.

name: 360 Drinking Cup 250ml 6+ Months
description: B.BOX 360 DRINKING CUP 250ML 6+ MONTHS 1 EACH
long_description:
Meet our 360 cup... supporting independent drinking, with a twist!

Great for littlies that are learning to drink, our 360 cup lets kids sip from a super-soft silicone, lip-activated 360 Ì drinking rim. Offering flow control (the firmer they press the more liquid will flow) and less spills, the silicone rim seals closed when not in use...so clever!

name: Antibacterial Sterilizer Tablets
description: MILTON ANTIBACTERIAL TABLETS
long_description:
Milton, the expert in cold water sterilisation of baby feeding equipment for over 70 years

Use in Cold Water Sterilisation Method which sterilises in just 15 minutes and kills 99.9% of germs.

Made solution is effective for 24 hours and comes in a convenient 30 tablet pack.

- Ideal for travel.

- Effective in 15 minutes.

- Stay sterile for 24 hours.

Why sterilise?

During your baby's first 12 months, their immune system is still developing so they need extra protection from germs.

What should I sterilise?

Bottles, teats, soothers, plastic feeding spoons, weaning bowls, teething rings, toys, breastfeeding equipment such as breastpump parts and milk storage containers.

  • Ideal for travel.

  • Effective in 15 minutes.

  • Stay sterile for 24 hours
