long_description:
We love babies.

And we understand baby's eyes are very delicate and need special care. That's why Johnson's baby shampoo's unique No More Tears formula is as gentle to the eyes as pure water. Soap-free and hypoallergenic. Ideal for everyday use on babies and adults.

We know baby's delicate hair needs special care during bath time. That's why our shampoo for babies, is specially designed to gently cleanse baby's fine hair and delicate scalp. This baby shampoo cleanses gently and rinses easily, leaving your baby's hair soft, shiny, manageable and clean while maintaining a fresh smell. We know baby's delicate hair needs special care during bath time. That's why our shampoo for babies, is specially designed to gently cleanse baby's fine hair and delicate scalp. This baby shampoo cleanses gently and rinses easily, leaving your baby's hair soft, shiny, manageable and clean while maintaining a fresh smell.

- Tested with paediatricians
- Hypoallergenic, pH balanced & soap-free
- No More Tears shampoo formula allows for a tear-free experience
- Gentle to the eyes as pure water
- No added parabens, phthalates, sulfates or dyes.

Johnsons Baby Shampoo is also suitable for kids and adults.
  • Triple Baby Protection.

  • Safety. Mildness. Effectiveness.

  • Gently Cleanses Hair & Scalp

  • Tested with Pediatricians

  • Great for Babies & Adults Too
ingredients: Water, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Decyl Glucoside, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, PEG-80 Sorbitan Laurate, Glycerin, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Fragrance, Citric Acid, PEG-150 Distearate, Disodium EDTA, Polyquaternium-10

name: 2 In 1 Shampoo And Conditioner
description: QV 2 IN 1 SHAMPOO AND CONDITIONER 250G
long_description:
QV Baby 2 in 1 Shampoo & Conditioner is a gentle, tear-free foaming formula, that is suitable to use daily for cleansing and conditioning baby's hair and scalp. Colour, soap and fragrance free. Non-irritating formula. Propylene glycol free. pH balanced. 
  • Paediatrician recommended.

  • Gentle, low irritant, tear-free formulation.

  • Dual action formula with only the pivotal ingredients needed to cleanse and condition the hair.

  • pH balanced to help maintain the skin's natural protective properties.

  • Free from colour, fragrance and soap.

  • Vegan Friendly - contains no animal derived ingredients..

  • Suitable for use with sensitive skin, cradle cap and baby eczema..

  • Dermatologically tested..
ingredients: Aqua (Water), Glycerin, TEA-Lauryl Sulfate, Polyquaternium-44, Lauryl Betaine, Disodium Cocoamphodiacetate, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Acrylates / C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate, Crosspolymer, Aminomethyl Propanol, Methylparaben, Propylparaben.

name: Little Bodies Eczema Relief Cream
description: DERMAL THERAPY LITTLE BODIES ECZEMA RELIEF CREAM 56 GRAM
long_description:
Dermal Therapy Little Bodies Eczema Relief Cream is a gentle formulation containing Oatmeal colloidal that relieves symptoms of mild eczema and dermatitis in children such as skin dryness, irritation and itchy skin.

Deisgned specifically for young children, Dermal Therapy Little Bodies Eczema Relief Cream also contains Calendula officinalis and Aloe vera.

Does not contain paraffin, parabens or tar and is fragrance free.

Suitable for sensitive skin.

  • RELIEVES SYMPTOMS OF MILD ECZEMA IN CHILDREN

  • Relieves skin dryness and itchy skin in children associated with mild eczema
ingredients: Water, Glycerine, Cetearyl glucoside (and) Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Dehydroxanthan gum, Shea butter, Castor oil, Zinc Oxide, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl alcohol, Citric acid, Sodium hydroxide Colloidal Oatmeal 50 mg/g, Aloe Vera (Aloe Barbadensis) Juice Dry Powder equivalent to Fresh Leaf Inner 1g/g, Calendula Officinalis 10mg/g, Peppermint oil 10mg/g

name: Little Bodies Eczema Moisturizing Lotion
description: DERMAL THERAPY LITTLE BODIES ECZEMA MOISTURIZING LOTION 175ML
long_description:
Dermal Therapy Little Bodies Eczema Moisturising Lotion is a gentle formulation containing 2% colloidal oatmeal that relieves symptoms of mild eczema and dermatitis in children, such as skin dryness, irritation and itchy skin.

Designed specifically for young children, Dermal Therapy Little Bodies Eczema Moisturising Lotion can be used as an everyday moisturiser.

For best results use with

- Dermal Therapy Little Bodies Eczema Wash & Shampoo
  • RELIEVES SYMPTOMS OF MILD ECZEMA IN CHILDREN

  • Relieves skin dryness and itchy skin in children associated with mild eczema

name: Baby Dermexa Fragrance Free Eczema Prone Sensitive Moisturising Cream
description: AVEENO BABY DERMEXA MOISTURISING CREAM
long_description:
Aveeno Baby Dermexa Moisturising Cream is formulated with naturally active Triple Oat Complex to soothe and hydrate skin. It also contains ceramides that help enhance skin's ability to retain moisture, restoring the skin's protective function. This unique baby lotion works to soothe your baby's dry, itchy skin, and is clinically proven suitable for eczema prone skin. The advanced body lotion formulation helps to reduce the appearance of redness and scaling, helping to restore the skin barrier and put dry, uncomfortable skin at ease. Skin is moisturised and feelings of tightness are alleviated.

- Formulated with active nautral Triple Oat Complex which contains oat essence, colloidal oatmeal and oat oils
- Clinically proven suitable for your baby's eczema prone skin
- Moisturiser relieves and soothes dry, itchy skin
- Helps to restore the skins natural moisture barrier
- Moisturises for 24 hours
- Fragrance free
- Cortisone free
- No lanolins or dyes

Aveeno Active Naturals are ingredients derived from nature and uniquely formulated to reveal skin's natural beauty.
Aveeno Baby is a US Paediatrician Recommended Brand.
  • Dermexa Moisturising Cream

  • Colloidal Oatmeal

  • Relieves & Soothes Dry, Itchy Skin

  • 206g
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Panthenol, Distearyldimonium Chloride, Petrolatum, Isopropyl Palmitate, Cetyl Alcohol, Dimethicone, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Flour, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Oil, Steareth-20, Benzalkonium Chloride, Ceramide NP, Sodium Chloride, Potassium Sorbate, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract. (F#11336-165)

name: Bedtime Baby Lotion
description: JOHNSON'S BEDTIME BABY LOTION 200ML
long_description:
A good night's sleep leads to a better tomorrow. Help baby sleep up to One Hour Longer with Johnson's Clinically Proven bedtime routine. Johnson's Baby Triple Baby Protection is our commitment to caring protection that combines Safety, Mildness and Effectiveness.

- Releases NATURALCALMTM essences-a special blend of gentle and calming aromas
- Clinically proven mild and gentle formula
- Dermatologist-tested and hypoallergenic
- No added parabens, phthalates, and dyes
- Help baby sleep up to ONE HOUR LONGER with Johnson's clinically proven bedtime routine

Warm Bath + Gentle Massage + Quiet Time.

Sometimes babies have trouble sleeping. Try Johnson's 3-step bedtime baby routine. Our lotion is clinically proven to help babies and toddlers, go to sleep easier and sleep better through the night in just seven days.

With a bath using Johnson's Baby Bedtime Bath, a gentle massage using Johnson's Baby Bedtime lotion and quiet time, you can let your newborn drift off to a better night's sleep.


  • Naturalcalm aromas

  • Dermatologist Tested

  • Hypoallergenic

  • No Added Parabens
ingredients: Water, Isopropyl Palmitate, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Dimethicone, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Fragrance, Polysorbate 20, Magnesium Aluminium Silicate, Carbomer, p-Anisic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Xanthan Gum, Ethylhexylglycerin

name: Baby Daily Lotion
description: AVEENO BABY DAILY LOTION 227G
long_description:
Aveeno Baby Daily Lotion is a baby lotion that contains natural colloidal oatmeal and rich emollients to soothe and moisturise your baby's delicate, dry skin.

This naturally non-greasy baby lotion formula absorbs quickly and is deeply moisturising.

This baby lotion is hypoallergic and fragrance free, so it won't irritate sensitive skin. It's even gentle enough for newborns.

Aveeno Baby Daily Lotion is Paediatrician recommended moisturiser and can be used every day to help keep your baby's skin soft, smooth and healthy-looking.

- Protects against and alleviates chapping, cracking and roughness due to dryness
- Suitable for use on newborn babies
- Perfect for dry sensitive skin
- Moisturises for 24 hours
- Fragrance free
- Hypoallergenic
- No added parabens & phthalates

Aveeno Baby is a US Paediatrician Recommended Brand.
  • Daily Baby Lotion

  • 227mL

  • Fragrance Free

  • Nautral Colloidal Oatmeal

name: Baby Soothing Moisturising Cream
description: CETAPHIL BABY SOOTHING MOISTURISING CREAM 566G
long_description:
Cetaphil Baby Soothing Moisturising Cream is a lightweight, non-greasy, rich cream that moisturises skin intensively for 48 hours non-stop hydration.

This hypoallergenic formula is clinically proven to soothe baby's very dry, irritated and sensitive skin. Protects baby's skin barrier for up to 8 hours from the first use, so baby's delicate skin feels soothed, soft & smooth.

Formulated with a triple active blend of Glycerin, Sunflower seed oil and Almond Oil to hydrate and strengthen baby's skin barrier from the first use. This gentle cream also helps accelerate skin barrier repair and repairs the weakened skin moisture barrier in just 3 days.

Paediatric Dermatologists tested.

Fragrance, paraben, mineral oil and petroleum free. 0% Animal Origin. Safe for Newborns.

Suitable for daily use on face and body for newborns+, dry, irritated, delicate and sensitive skin.

  • Moisturises skin intensively for 48 hours hydration

  • Accelerates skin barrier repair to soothe skin irritation and protects baby's skin barrier for up to 8 hours

  • Blend of Glycerin, Sunflower seed oil and Almond Oil to hydrate and strengthen baby's skin barrier from the first use

  • Paediatric Dermatologists tested and suitable for Newborns

  • Hypoallergenic and non-irritating formula

  • Free from fragrances, parabens, mineral oil and petroleum.
ingredients: Aqua, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Dimethicone, Cetearyl Alcohol, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Synthetic Beeswax, Methyl Glucose Sesquistearate, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Dimethiconol, Phenoxyethanol, Potassium Cetyl Phosphate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Disodium Edta, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Hydroxide.
